//: Claude Code settings — drop this into ~/.claude/settings.json
Replace <LITELLM_MASTER_KEY> with your actual key from .env
All requests route through LiteLLM using role-based model names.
Valid roles: router | reasoner | coder | supervisor | embed
The 'model' field below makes Claude Code send 'coder' to LiteLLM.
Change to 'reasoner' or 'supervisor' as needed for different tasks.
